title: catha heterophylla
intro: Catha heterophylla, also known as false catha, is a plant species in the catha family native to tropical Africa. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Catha heterophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Catha heterophylla can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
